decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms bTJGS children are only bTJGY (text) and bTJGe (Mark as Completed button); decompose ui_refs list bTJGe as the in-scope completion control and include no completed-state icon or text node. AC-2 passes: cells show completion indicators via Text_success_ styling and CheckCircle2 when session is in the completed set, with bTJGe hidden on that branch — an intentional React conditional swap, not a missing named ui_ref. criteria_audit AC-2 and all ui_evidence entries pass; the anonymous completed span is polish parity tooling, not an AC or downstream blocker.

Distinct from the prior fix_now C-2 (invented Group_transparent_ chip chrome on bTJGS), which rewrite verified as resolved. Remaining finding is supplemental Tailwind typography (text-base font-semibold on bTJGB, text-sm leading-snug on bTJGY) layered on top of bubbleStyle(Text_heading_3_/Text_body_) tokens. Named ui_refs carry correct data-bubble-id and style_ref; ui_evidence for bTJGB and bTJGY both pass. Typography token extraction beyond DS-01 bubble-styles.css is low-priority polish not cited in decompose ACs; precedent DS-05 deferred equivalent supplemental Tailwind on bubble shells. No downstream depends_on item requires stripping these overrides before advance.

Valid coverage-artifact hygiene gap: rewrite pass files_changed omits frontend/src/lib/dashboard/microCommitmentsApi.ts despite it being a decompose target_file and AC-3 evidence source. Implement criteria_audit AC-3 and functional_audit FV-1/FV-2 both pass with microCommitmentsApi.ts cited; omission affects audit traceability in the coverage JSON only, not source correctness or gate satisfaction. Refresh files_changed on next coverage touch or cycle hygiene wave — not a rewrite blocker for DASH-03 implement advance.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, prior C-2 Group_transparent_ chip fix verified on rewrite pass. Accepted: C-1 completed-state span without data-bubble-id — no IR/ui_ref element exists beyond bTJGe; conditional swap is intentional. Deferred: C-2 supplemental typography Tailwind on bTJGB/bTJGY as DS polish within DASH-03; C-3 coverage files_changed omission of microCommitmentsApi.ts as artifact hygiene.
